Withdrawal Settings: Your withdrawal request for order #%1 has been received.
Postavke odustanka: Vaš zahtjev za odustanak od narudžbe #%1 je primljen.

Withdrawal Settings: You will receive a confirmation email shortly.
The shop will contact you regarding the next steps (e.g. return of goods, refund).
Postavke odustanka: Trgovina će vas kontaktirati glede sljedećih koraka (npr. povrat robe, povrat novca).

Withdrawal Settings: Please enter your order number and the email address used for the order to find your order.
Postavke odustanka: Unesite broj narudžbe i e-adresu korištenu pri narudžbi.

Withdrawal Settings: By submitting the withdrawal, you declare that you wish to revoke the purchase contract for this order.
Postavke odustanka: Podnošenjem odustanka izjavljujete da želite raskinuti ugovor o kupnji za ovu narudžbu.

Withdrawal Settings: A withdrawal request has already been submitted for this order.
Postavke odustanka: Zahtjev za odustanak već je podnesen za ovu narudžbu.

Withdrawal Settings: The withdrawal period for this order has expired. The deadline was: %1
Postavke odustanka: Rok za odustanak od ove narudžbe je istekao. Rok je bio: %1

Withdrawal Settings: Are you sure you want to submit the withdrawal for this order? This action cannot be undone.
Postavke odustanka: Jeste li sigurni da želite podnijeti odustanak za ovu narudžbu? Ova radnja se ne može poništiti.

Withdrawal Settings: The order could not be found.
Invalid form key. Please try again.
The withdrawal function is currently not available.
Please log in to submit a withdrawal.
You are not authorized to withdraw this order.
Postavke odustanka: Niste ovlašteni odustati od ove narudžbe.

Withdrawal Settings: You are not authorized to view this order.
The provided email does not match the order.
A withdrawal request already exists for this order.
Postavke odustanka: Zahtjev za odustanak već postoji za ovu narudžbu.

Withdrawal Settings: The withdrawal period for this order has expired.
Postavke odustanka: Rok za odustanak od ove narudžbe je istekao.
Vaš zahtjev za odustanak je podnesen.

Withdrawal Settings: Unable to submit withdrawal request. Please try again.
Postavke odustanka: Nije moguće podnijeti zahtjev za odustanak. Pokušajte ponovo.
Odustanak zatražen od strane kupca dana %1.

Withdrawal Settings: Please enter both order number and email address.
No order found with the given order number and email address.
Postavke odustanka: Nije pronađena narudžba s navedenim brojem i e-adresom.

Withdrawal Settings: Enable or disable the withdrawal button functionality.
Postavke odustanka: Aktivirajte ili deaktivirajte funkcionalnost gumba za odustanak.

Withdrawal Settings: Email address to receive withdrawal notifications. If empty, the general store email will be used.
Postavke odustanka: E-adresa za primanje obavijesti o odustanku. Ako je prazna, koristit će se opća e-adresa trgovine.

Withdrawal Settings: Number of days after order placement during which withdrawal is allowed. Default: 14 days.
Postavke odustanka: Broj dana od slanja posljednje djelomične pošiljke u kojima je odustanak dopušten. Zadano: 14 dana.

Withdrawal Settings: This order has not been shipped yet. You may withdraw at any time until you receive the goods.
Postavke odustanka: Ova narudžba još nije isporučena. Možete odustati u bilo koje vrijeme dok ne primite robu.

Withdrawal Settings: Email template sent to the customer after withdrawal request.
Postavke odustanka: Predložak e-pošte poslan kupcu nakon zahtjeva za odustanak.

Withdrawal Settings: Email template sent to the shop owner after withdrawal request.
Postavke odustanka: Predložak e-pošte poslan vlasniku trgovine nakon zahtjeva za odustanak.
Novi zahtjev za odustanak za narudžbu #%order_increment_id

Withdrawal Settings: We have received your withdrawal request for Order #%order_increment_id.
Postavke odustanka: Primili smo vaš zahtjev za odustanak od narudžbe #%order_increment_id.

Withdrawal Settings: Your withdrawal request has been registered successfully.
Postavke odustanka: Vaš zahtjev za odustanak je uspješno registriran.

Withdrawal Settings: The shop will process your withdrawal request and contact you regarding the next steps (e.g. return of goods, refund).
Postavke odustanka: Trgovina će obraditi vaš zahtjev za odustanak i kontaktirati vas glede sljedećih koraka (npr. povrat, refundacija).

Withdrawal Settings: If you have any questions, please contact us.
Postavke odustanka: Ako imate pitanja, molimo kontaktirajte nas.

Withdrawal Settings: A new withdrawal request has been submitted.
Postavke odustanka: Podnesen je novi zahtjev za odustanak.

Withdrawal Settings: Please review this withdrawal request and take the necessary steps.
Postavke odustanka: Molimo pregledajte ovaj zahtjev za odustanak i poduzmite potrebne korake.

Withdrawal Settings: Withdrawal is only possible for orders with one of these statuses. Default: pending, processing, complete.
Postavke odustanka: Odustanak je moguć samo za narudžbe s jednim od ovih statusa. Zadano: na čekanju, u obradi, završeno.

Withdrawal Settings: Withdrawal is only possible for orders with one of these statuses.
Postavke odustanka: Odustanak je moguć samo za narudžbe s jednim od ovih statusa.

Withdrawal Settings: All items of this order have already been withdrawn.
Postavke odustanka: Sve stavke ove narudžbe su već povučene.

Withdrawal Settings: Some items from this order have already been withdrawn. The items marked below are no longer available for withdrawal.
Postavke odustanka: Neke stavke ove narudžbe su već povučene. Stavke označene ispod više nisu dostupne za povlačenje.

Withdrawal Settings: Select the items you wish to withdraw. You may withdraw individual items (partial withdrawal) or all items at once.
Postavke odustanka: Odaberite stavke koje želite povući. Možete povući pojedinačne stavke (djelomično povlačenje) ili sve stavke odjednom.

Withdrawal Settings: Please select at least one item to withdraw.
Postavke odustanka: Odaberite najmanje jednu stavku za povlačenje.

Withdrawal Settings: One or more of the selected items have already been withdrawn and cannot be withdrawn again.
Postavke odustanka: Jedna ili više odabranih stavki već su povučene i ne mogu se ponovno povući.

Withdrawal Settings: Partial withdrawal is not enabled. Please withdraw the entire order.
Postavke odustanka: Djelomično povlačenje nije omogućeno. Povucite cijelu narudžbu.

Withdrawal Settings: Partial withdrawal requested by customer on %1. Items: %2
Postavke odustanka: Djelomično povlačenje zatraženo od strane kupca dana %1. Stavke: %2

Withdrawal Settings: Allow customers to withdraw individual items instead of the entire order.
Postavke odustanka: Omogućuje kupcima povlačenje pojedinačnih stavki umjesto cijele narudžbe.

Withdrawal Settings: We have received your %withdrawal_type_label for Order #%order_increment_id.
No item details recorded for this withdrawal request.
Postavke odustanka: Za ovaj zahtjev za povlačenje nisu zabilježeni detalji stavki.

Withdrawal Settings: Withdrawal request confirmed by the shop on %1.
Postavke odustanka: Zahtjev za odustanak potvrđen je od strane trgovine dana %1.

Withdrawal Settings: Withdrawal request rejected by the shop on %1.
Postavke odustanka: Zahtjev za odustanak odbijen je od strane trgovine dana %1.
